S
The Systems
Projects

A collection of tools and applications built to solve real problems at the intersection of medicine, productivity, and technology. Each project represents a unique approach to visualizing and organizing complex information.

Med School Tracker

MedTracker

Med School Tracker is a specialized productivity tool designed specifically for medical students. It helps track clinical rotations, patient encounters, procedures, and study progress. The platform provides insightful analytics to help students identify areas for improvement and celebrate milestones throughout their medical education journey.

Tech Stack

ReactNext.jsTypeScriptPostgreSQLTailwind CSS
  • Clinical rotation tracking
  • Patient encounter logging
  • Procedure documentation
ExploreVisit Site

MedTracker Preview

BlockOut

BlockOut

BlockOut brings a unique visual approach to task management by combining the intuitive treemap visualization of WinDirStat with powerful planning capabilities. See your time and tasks as a visual landscape, making it easy to understand your workload at a glance and plan your days, weeks, and months effectively.

Tech Stack

ReactD3.jsTypeScriptNode.jsRedis
  • Treemap task visualization
  • Medium-term planning (weeks/months)
  • Daily scheduling integration
ExploreVisit Site

BlockOut Preview

Increment

In DevelopmentIncrement

Increment reimagines note-taking by combining the simplicity of lists with the power of AI. Write down your thoughts, ideas, and tasks naturally, and let the AI help break complex tasks into actionable steps, suggest related ideas, and organize your notes intelligently. It's the thinking companion for the modern knowledge worker.

Tech Stack

ReactOpenAI APITypeScriptMongoDBNext.js
  • List-based note organization
  • AI task decomposition
  • Smart suggestions
Explore

Increment Preview
